amplifyuibuilder.form.formstyleconfig.Cf: The `FormStyleConfig` property specifies the configuration settings for the form's style properties.

amplifyuibuilder.form.formstyleconfig.To.Description: A reference to a design token to use to bind the form's style properties to an existing theme.

amplifyuibuilder.form.formstyleconfig.Va.Description: The value of the style setting.
